title: make your own magnetic silly putty
description: This idea was suggested to me by mnsman1 - it's not quite what he was thinking but i thought it was pretty cool and pretty easy - all you do is mix water and pva with some kind of magnetic particle - i used magnetite but iron would do as well and then added borax solution to it. The reaction was almost immediate. The thickness of the putty is determined by the water to pva ratio - but play with it and see what you get..
